key.name: function-highlighting
key.description: Whether to highlight function names in code blocks

key.name: syntax-color-enabled
key.description: Whether to enable syntax color highlighting in the markdown editor using syntect themes

key.name: markdown-warnings
key.description: Whether to show warnings for markdown formatting issues

key.name: ui-theme
key.description: The UI theme to use: system follows desktop theme, light forces light theme, dark forces dark theme. Default is 'system' (System Default).

key.name: css-theme
key.description: The CSS theme to use for rendering markdown content. Default is 'standard' (Standard CSS Theme).

key.name: custom-css-file
key.description: Path to a custom CSS file to use for styling markdown content. Leave empty to use the selected theme.

key.name: layout-mode
key.description: The layout mode for the application: editor-left places the editor on the left with preview on the right, editor-right places the editor on the right with preview on the left

key.name: window-width
key.description: The width of the main window in pixels

key.name: window-height
key.description: The height of the main window in pixels

key.name: window-x
key.description: The X position of the main window on screen

key.name: window-y
key.description: The Y position of the main window on screen

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window should start maximized

key.name: language
key.description: The language to use for the user interface

key.name: view-mode
key.description: The view mode to use: html shows rendered preview, code shows raw markdown, split shows both side by side
